Introduction
    High school Kaito gains a card that summons a warrior maiden after defeating a rare slime. He admires his popular childhood friend but this discovery gives him a chance for an extraordinary life, battling in a modern fantasy world.

Also known as: Heroic Exploration Tale Starting from Mob
